trigger_keywords: variable de vinificación afecta más directamente el cuerpo del vino

steps.label: cause
steps.text: The producer changes the extent of extraction from grape skins and other solids during winemaking.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Greater contact and extraction transfer more phenolics, tannins, colour compounds, and other material into the fermenting wine.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Within the same fruit and style context, higher extraction generally increases structure and the sensation of body; extraction is not the only determinant of body.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Extraction changes body by altering the amount of structural material transferred from grape solids.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
